meaning: n.(金属,岩石等的)薄片,[植]叶片,[解]板,层
examples: The secondary laminae contain basal cells which attach via hemidesmosomes to the basement membrane.
Lacustrine laminae are mainly deposited in lake water with obvious layering. Such factors as temperature, salinity and depth control the water layering.
The middle layer of laminae is brought about either by submarginal initials of by the first cell of the abaxial layer of mesophyll alone or by both of them .
